items.title: Mark Gurman Says Tim Cook Likely To Remain As Apple CEO Through At Least Mid-2026
items.description: Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman has shared that Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) CEO Tim Cook is likely to retain his position until at least mid-2026, a claim that contradicts earlier reports. What Happened: The Financial Times had earlier reported this month that Apple was gearing up for Cook’s departure “as soon as next year.” This report had triggered speculations about a potential leadership transition ahead of Apple’s annual events. However, Gurman, in his latest "Power On” report, refuted this claim. Gur
